name: feature.campaign-brief.agents
description: Personas & Campaign Brief agent pack (ADR 0156 / ADR 0014) — the Campaign Brief Strategist, a manifest agent whose tools are feature.campaign-brief.nodes over ctx.features['campaign-brief']. It validates a brief and generates the grounded messaging kernel from the AI chat. Tool-allowlisted to the Campaign Brief surface only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Campaign Brief Strategist
agents.description: Validates a campaign brief and generates its messaging kernel — the shared strategic foundation every channel echoes — grounded in the knowledge base and brand voice, via feature.campaign-brief.nodes. Recommends; the human approves the kernel.
